traits.name: Celestial Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to Necrotic damage and Radiant damage.

traits.name: Healing Hands
traits.description: As a Magic action, you can touch a creature and roll a number of d4s equal to your Proficiency Bonus. The creature regains a number of Hit Points equal to the total rolled. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Light Bearer
traits.description: You know the Light cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.

traits.name: Celestial Revelation
traits.description:
When you reach character level 3, you can transform as a Bonus Action using one of the options below (choose the option each time). The transformation lasts for 1 minute or until you end it (no action required). Once you transform, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Heavenly Wings: Two spectral wings sprout from your back temporarily. Until the transformation ends, you have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed.

Inner Radiance: Temporary golden radiance shines from your eyes and mouth. For the duration, you shed Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet, and at the end of each of your turns, each creature within 10 feet of you takes Radiant damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

Necrotic Shroud: Your eyes briefly become pools of darkness, and flightless wings sprout from your back temporarily. Creatures other than your allies within 10 feet of you must succeed on a Charisma saving throw (DC 8 plus your Charisma modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or be Frightened of you until the end of your next turn. For the duration, once per turn, you can deal extra Necrotic damage to one target when you deal damage to it with an attack or a spell. The extra damage equals your Proficiency Bonus.

traits.name: Draconic Ancestry
traits.description:
Your lineage stems from a dragon progenitor. Choose the kind of dragon from the Draconic Ancestors table. Your choice affects your Breath Weapon and Damage Resistance traits. The chosen dragon also affects your appearance, with you having one or more draconic features: scale patterns, elongated fingers, horns, or other characteristics evocative of your draconic lineage.

Ancestry options and their damage types: Black (Acid), Blue (Lightning), Brass (Fire), Bronze (Lightning), Copper (Acid), Gold (Fire), Green (Poison), Red (Fire), Silver (Cold), White (Cold).

traits.name: Breath Weapon
traits.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks with an exhalation of magical energy in either a 15-foot cone or a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide (your choice). Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw (for a line) or a Constitution saving throw (for a cone) against a DC equal to 8 + your Constitution modifier + your Proficiency Bonus. On a failed save, a creature takes 1d10 damage of the type associated with your Draconic Ancestry. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage. This damage increases by 1d10 when you reach character levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10).

You can use your Breath Weapon a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Damage Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance to the damage type associated with your Draconic Ancestry.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Draconic Flight
traits.description: When you reach character level 5, you can channel draconic magic to give yourself temporary flight. As a Bonus Action, you sprout spectral draconic wings on your back that last for 10 minutes or until you retract them (no action required). During that time, you have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed. Your wings appear to be made of the same energy as your Breath Weapon. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Dwarven Resilience
traits.description: You have Resistance to Poison damage. You also have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Poisoned condition on yourself.

traits.name: Dwarven Toughness
traits.description: Your Hit Point maximum increases by 1, and it increases by 1 again whenever you gain a level.

traits.name: Stonecunning
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you gain Tremorsense with a range of 60 feet for 10 minutes. You must be on a stone surface or touching a stone surface to use this Tremorsense. The sense can detect through stone but not other materials. When you use this Bonus Action, you can't do so again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Elven Lineage
traits.description: You are part of an elven lineage that grants you supernatural abilities. Choose a lineage: Drow, High Elf, or Wood Elf. Each lineage provides different benefits and cantrips.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition on yourself.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have Proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Elven Lineage (Drow)
traits.description: You are part of the Drow lineage. You know the Dancing Lights cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast the Faerie Fire spell with this trait. Starting at 5th level, you can also cast the Darkness spell with this trait. Once you cast Faerie Fire or Darkness with this trait, you can't cast that spell with it again until you finish a Long Rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition on yourself.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have Proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Elven Lineage (High Elf)
traits.description: You are part of the High Elf lineage. You know the Prestidigitation cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast the Detect Magic spell with this trait. Starting at 5th level, you can also cast the Misty Step spell with this trait. Once you cast Detect Magic or Misty Step with this trait, you can't cast that spell with it again until you finish a Long Rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition on yourself.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have Proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Elven Lineage (Wood Elf)
traits.description: You are part of the Wood Elf lineage. You know the Druidcraft cantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast the Longstrider spell with this trait. Starting at 5th level, you can also cast the Pass without Trace spell with this trait. Once you cast Longstrider or Pass without Trace with this trait, you can't cast that spell with it again until you finish a Long Rest. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for these spells. Your Speed is also 35 feet rather than 30.

traits.name: Fey Ancestry
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Charmed condition on yourself.

traits.name: Keen Senses
traits.description: You have Proficiency in the Perception skill.

traits.name: Trance
traits.description: You don't need to sleep, and magic can't put you to sleep. You can finish a Long Rest in 4 hours if you spend those hours in a trancelike meditation, during which you retain consciousness.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage
traits.description: You are part of a gnomish lineage. Choose Forest Gnome or Rock Gnome.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage (Forest Gnome)
traits.description: You are part of the Forest Gnome lineage. You know the Minor Illusion cantrip. You can also cast the Speak with Animals spell with this trait. You can cast it a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Gnomish Cunning
traits.description: You have Advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

traits.name: Gnomish Lineage (Rock Gnome)
traits.description: You are part of the Rock Gnome lineage. You know the Mending and Prestidigitation cantrips. You can also cast the Identify spell with this trait. You can cast it a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Giant Ancestry
traits.description:
You are descended from giants. Choose one of the following Giant Ancestor options, each of which provides a supernatural ability:

Cloud Giant: You have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed for 1 minute. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regaining all uses on a Long Rest.

Frost Giant: You have Resistance to Cold damage.

Fire Giant: You have Resistance to Fire damage.

Hill Giant: When you fail an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma saving throw, you can reroll the save with Advantage. You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regaining all uses on a Long Rest.

Stone Giant: You have Resistance to Bludgeoning damage.

Storm Giant: You have Resistance to Lightning damage and Thunder damage.

traits.name: Large Form
traits.description: Starting at character level 5, you can change your size to Large as a Bonus Action if you're in a big enough space. This transformation lasts for 10 minutes or until you end it (no action required). For that duration, you have Advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You have Advantage on any saving throw you make to end the Grappled condition on yourself. You also count as one Size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

traits.name: Brave
traits.description: You have Advantage on saving throws you make to avoid or end the Frightened condition on yourself.

traits.name: Halfling Nimbleness
traits.description: You can move through the space of any creature that is of a size larger than yours, but you can't stop there.

traits.name: Luck
traits.description: When you roll a 1 on the d20 for a D20 Test, you can reroll the die, and you must use the new roll.

traits.name: Naturally Stealthy
traits.description: You can take the Hide action even when you are obscured only by a creature that is at least one size larger than you.

traits.name: Resourceful
traits.description: You gain Heroic Inspiration whenever you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Skillful
traits.description: You gain Proficiency in one skill of your choice.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.description: You gain an Origin Feat of your choice. See the Feats chapter for the list of feats.

traits.name: Adrenaline Rush
traits.description:
You can take the Dash action as a Bonus Action. When you do so, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus.

You can use this trait a number of times equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You have Advantage on any saving throw you make to end the Grappled condition on yourself. You also count as one Size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

traits.name: Relentless Endurance
traits.description: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead. Once you use this trait, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet.

traits.name: Fiendish Legacy
traits.description:
You are the recipient of a legacy that grants you supernatural abilities. Choose a legacy from the Fiendish Legacies table. You gain the level 1 benefit of the chosen legacy.

Abyssal Legacy: You have Resistance to Poison damage. You know the Poison Spray cantrip. Starting at level 3, you can cast the Ray of Sickness spell with this trait. Starting at level 5, you can also cast the Hold Person spell with this trait. Once you cast Ray of Sickness or Hold Person with this trait, you can't cast that spell again until you finish a Long Rest. Constitution is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

Chthonic Legacy: You have Resistance to Necrotic damage. You know the Chill Touch cantrip. Starting at level 3, you can cast the False Life spell with this trait. Starting at level 5, you can also cast the Ray of Enfeeblement spell with this trait. Once you cast False Life or Ray of Enfeeblement with this trait, you can't cast that spell again until you finish a Long Rest. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

Infernal Legacy: You have Resistance to Fire damage. You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Starting at level 3, you can cast the Hellish Rebuke spell with this trait as a 2nd-level spell. Starting at level 5, you can also cast the Darkness spell with this trait. Once you cast Hellish Rebuke or Darkness with this trait, you can't cast that spell again until you finish a Long Rest. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells.

traits.name: Otherworldly Presence
traits.description: You know the Thaumaturgy cantrip. Charisma is your spellcasting ability for it.
